title: Sqlitelogictest crash on groupby query with coalesce call
poc: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT ALL - 52 * + COALESCE ( + col2, + 47 / + 25 ) FROM tab1 AS cor0 GROUP BY cor0.col2, cor0.col2;
key_bug_features: Group by query with coalesce call
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value1 INTEGER, value2 INTEGER, value3 INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table1 VALUES(1, NULL, 10, 20), (2, 5, NULL, 30), (3, 15, 25, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table2(ref_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table1(id));
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(value1), 0) AS total_value, COALESCE(MAX(value2), -1) AS max_value FROM test_table1 GROUP BY value3;
